---
title: "About"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

### This content appears above the formatted about page content.

:::{#hero-heading}

I can't keep up with the footsteps of thinking in verbal. I like practice than imagination, and I like to feel better than vanity.I like new technologies related to computer, regardless of software and hardware.There is an own blog website that tossed the integrated system from sensors to single -chip machines to server for three years and as its own papers; I do not like to compete with others, but I want to prove myself that I have won two mathematical modeling competitions.The best ranking, but it is not bad.Once I was determined to become an information security expert, I joined the big security because of filling in the wrong professional. Generally, the size of the size is large. It is only a headache for security administrators. FortunatelyAssistant and fun.The current ambition is to become a writer, writing novels after retirement, so he pays special attention to the perception of life and work. Read more records and record more at your spare time to accumulate thoughts and words.

## Education

University of GuiZhou, HuaXi
Master of Safety Science and Engineering | Sep 2020 - June 2023

University of GuiZhou, HuaXi
Bachelor of Safety Engineering | Sep 2016 - June 2020

## Experience

Still alive.

:::

<!-- ### This content appears below the formatted about page content. -->
